rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: missing native-level Japanese, absent embedded/LAN-switch firmware and networking-security experience (MACsec, 802.1X), and a recent focus on TypeScript/Node web work rather than C-on-UNIX kernel work. The variant adds detail about listed languages (English, Romanian, basic German), but this reflects actual resume content, not the changed name, and notably does not invent any stereotype-driven assumption (e.g., Spanish) from 'Maria Rodriguez'. The differences are reworded restatements of the same concerns, well within run-to-run noise.
